Silver · Regime State

A Deterministic Summary of Silver Macro Regime Conditions.

As of 2026-02-08

Gemini Summary

### Silver Regime State — Deterministic Summary

Silver Regime State — Deterministic Summary

Macro Component Classification Primary Driver / Signal
Liquidity Regime Neutral Fed Liquidity Expansion (2) offset by Neutral M2 Supply (3) and stable Neutral Rate Proxy (4).
Real Rate Regime Headwind 10-Year Real Yield is in a Bearish/Restrictive regime (1).
USD Regime Weakening USD Index is below its 12-month moving average (5), despite neutral speculative positioning (6).
Inflation Regime Neutral Term structure (8) and market-implied expectations (9) are stable/neutral.
Stress State Elevated VIX is in a "Stressed" regime (18), activating haven logic and neutralizing USD/Rate headwinds (20).

Horizon Bias

  • 1-Month: Bullish (11)(18)
  • 3-Month: Neutral (2)(1)

Conflict Flags

  • Liquidity Divergence: M2 neutral vs. Fed Assets expanding (2)(3).
  • Positioning Tension: Individual Silver extreme short z-score (-2.39) vs. broad Metals sector crowding (11)(12).
  • Real Rate vs. Stress: Restrictive rates offset by Safe-Haven logic activation (1)(18).
Regime Execution Note: Silver upside cap from real-rate headwinds (1) is neutralized by "Stressed" VIX levels (18). Extreme speculative short positioning (z-score -2.39) (11) indicates high squeeze-asymmetry risk on a 1-month horizon, while price action shows a breakout above 50d/200d trends (19).
The information presented is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute financial or investment advice. It has been prepared without regard to individual objectives, financial situation, or needs. You should consider whether it is appropriate for your circumstances and seek independent advice where necessary.
